mapper.sql: id,role_id,role_code, role_name,intro, create_by,create_by_id,create_time, update_by,update_by_id,update_time, status,is_deleted,tenant_id, app_id
mapper.select: -- 查询用户和角色关联的角色信息 SELECT tsr.* FROM t_sys_role tsr JOIN t_role_user_link trul ON trul.role_id = tsr.role_id AND trul.is_deleted = 0 AND trul.status = 1 AND trul.user_id = #{userId} WHERE tsr.is_deleted = 0 AND tsr.status = 1 UNION -- 查询用户所在用户组关联角色的角色信息 SELECT tsr.* FROM t_sys_role tsr JOIN t_role_user_group_link trugl ON trugl.role_id = tsr.role_id JOIN t_user_group_user_link tugul ON trugl.user_group_id = tugul.user_group_id AND trugl.is_deleted = 0 AND trugl.status = 1 AND tugul.is_deleted = 0 AND tugul.status = 1 JOIN t_sys_user_group tsug ON tugul.user_group_id = tsug.group_id AND tsug.is_deleted = 0 AND tsug.status = 1 WHERE tsr.is_deleted = 0 AND tsr.status = 1 and tugul.user_id = #{userId} UNION -- 查询用户所在部门关联角色的角色信息 SELECT tsr.* FROM t_sys_role tsr JOIN t_role_dept_link trdl ON trdl.role_id = tsr.role_id AND trdl.is_deleted = 0 AND trdl.status = 1 WHERE tsr.is_deleted = 0 AND tsr.status = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_sys_user tsu WHERE trdl.dept_id = tsu.dept_id AND tsu.is_deleted = 0 AND tsu.status = 1 AND tsu.user_id = #{userId})
